description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:8.9.1 Docker image and caches the node_modules/ directory with a key based on ${CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG}. Include a before_script that runs node -v, npm -v, installs gulp-cli and bower globally (npm install gulp-cli bower -g), installs project dependencies (npm install), and runs bower install --allow-root. Define a deploy stage containing a pages job that executes the command gulp build, publishes the resulting public/ folder as a pages artifact, and is limited to the master branch only.
